flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central Texas College rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.9k → $3.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Texas College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 (8.5% → 9.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Texas College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (5.4k → 6.2k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Central Texas College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (52.5% → 60.0%).
